title: Avengers Filled Pencil Case for Kids – 3 Zipped Compartments with Colouring Pens, Pencils, Ruler, Scissors & More – Avengers Stationery Set for Boys & Girls – Back to School Supplies Pencil Case Gift
features: AVENGERS FILLED PENCIL CASE STATIONERY SET : Includes 18 felt tip pens, 18 colouring pencils, ruler, scissors, pencil, pens, eraser and sharpener – ideal for schoolwork, colouring, and creative play
TRIPLE-ZIP COMPARTMENT DESIGN : Each zipped section holds a different set of stationery – helping kids stay neat and organised at school or home
BOLD AVENGERS CHARACTER DESIGN : Features a vibrant and colourful front graphic with iconic characters like Hulk, Thor and Captain America – a pencil case kids will love to show off!
BUILT TO WITHSTAND DAILY USE : Durable polyester outer, strong zips and secure elastic loops keep stationery safe and in place – made for busy school days
IDEAL FOR SCHOOL, TRAVEL & HOME : Compact enough for school bags, but roomy inside – perfect for classroom use, long journeys or quiet play at home
GIFT-READY FOR KIDS AGED 5+ : A great birthday, Christmas or back-to-school gift for superhero fans – a fun way to keep all their writing and drawing supplies in one place
description: Get your child ready for school, travel or creative time at home with this Avengers Filled Pencil Case – a complete stationery set that’s as practical as it is exciting. Designed with three zipped compartments, this case comes pre-filled with everything kids need to write, draw and organise their school day. Inside they’ll find: 18 x Assorted Colour Felt Tip Pens – ideal for colouring books, art projects and posters 18 x Colouring Pencils – great for schoolwork, drawing and sketching 1 x Red Ballpoint Pen & 1 x Blue Ballpoint Pen – suitable for everyday writing 1 x HB Pencil – perfect for maths, handwriting or rough notes 1 x 15cm Ruler, 1 x Eraser, 1 x Pencil Sharpener & 1 x Safety Scissors – must-have classroom stationery Each type of stationery has its own compartment, helping kids find what they need quickly and easily. The layout encourages neatness and makes packing up at the end of the day much simpler – no more missing pens or scattered supplies. The front panel features a vivid, full-colour Avengers design that stands out in any school bag, while elastic loops inside each compartment keep stationery secure and tidy. The rounded-tip scissors and wipe-clean polyester material make it a practical choice for younger children. Whether it’s for use at school, during homework, on long car journeys, or just at the kitchen table for crafts and colouring, this all-in-one set keeps everything in one place. A brilliant gift for birthdays, Christmas or the new school year, especially for boys and girls aged 5 and up who love superheroes and staying organised.
